titleStmt.title: SII 9.458: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 458. (A.R. No. 25 of 1915.) ON A PILLAR (NORTH FACE) IN THE NANDI-MANDAPA OF THE MALLIKARJUNA TEMPLE AT SRISAILAM, NANDIKOTKUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1379, Īśvara, Māgha, ba. 5, Guruvāra, corresponding to A.D. 1458 January 19 Thursday, in the reign of Prauḍha-Dēvarāya-Mahārāya. It records that the lady reader of the palace named Honnammavva purchased a plot of land and made a gift of it for offerings to the god Mallikārjuna and for feeding five Jaṅgamas in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrījayābhyudayaśālivāha
naśakavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1379 ne varuṣada �yo
śvarasaṁvatsarada māgha ba 5 gu lū śrīmaṁ
mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī
vīrapratāpa prauḍhadēvarāyamahā
rāyara Aramaneya vōduva hoṁ
naṁmavagaḷu namage pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgi kṣētra
vaṁ krayavukoṁḍu śrīmallikārju
nadēvarige dinake voṁdu Avasarada
harivāṇada neyivēdyada kaṭṭaḷevu
Ayivaru jaṁgamara Ārōgaṇa kaṭṭaḷe
vu Ācaṁdrārkasthāyāgi sā
rvvakālavū naḍeva hāṁge sama
rppisida(da)ḷu śrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.458 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
